results.name: has_hook
results.detail: "Protect the eyes that *carry you* through life."

results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Protect the eyes that carry you through life' is soft and poetic — no specific number, no contrarian angle, nothing that stops a 28-year-old mid-scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide owns one actionable idea and the 20-20-20 rule gives a concrete, this-week takeaway.
rationales.audience_fit: Eye health skews older as a concern; the tired-by-3pm 25-year-old isn't lying awake worrying about macular degeneration yet.
rationales.novelty: 20-20-20, sunglasses, eat your greens, get check-ups — this is the standard eye-health listicle they've already scrolled past.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged, voice is plain and calm, and the CTA connects eye habits back to the Health Score cleanly.
rationales.predicted_performance: Soft hook plus generic content means low save motivation — nothing here feels like a secret worth bookmarking.
